description:
Follow up the dashboard refresh bugs found during review of the TUI work.

Problem:
- `DashboardComponent.applySnapshot()` updates `workerSummary` but does not refresh `model.workers`, so an already-open `/bw` dashboard can keep stale worker rows after refresh.
- delegate/run flows launched from the Issues tab return fresh `DashboardStatusSnapshot` data, but that snapshot is only partially applied through the issue-explorer path, so the dashboard header and non-Issues tabs (especially Run and Workers) can stay stale until the overlay is reopened.

Scope:
- make dashboard snapshot application refresh the full worker row source, not just summary counts
- ensure delegate/run actions launched from the Issues tab apply the returned snapshot to the parent dashboard model, not just issue-explorer session state
- ensure the Workers and Run tabs reflect refreshed runtime/session data while the overlay stays open
- add regression coverage for in-overlay refresh behavior after both worker-state changes and issue-driven delegate/run actions

Primary lane:
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/dashboard.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/issue-explorer.ts`
- related dashboard/worker-manager/run tests

Acceptance criteria:
- refreshing the dashboard updates both worker summary badges and rendered worker rows
- landing/cleanup/review state changes appear in the Workers tab without reopening the overlay
- launching delegate/run from the Issues tab updates dashboard header, Run tab, and Workers tab state without reopening the overlay
- regression tests cover snapshot refresh with changed worker data and delegate/run follow-up refresh behavior

Parallel-safety note:
- keep this ticket tightly scoped to dashboard snapshot/update wiring and tests; avoid unrelated worker-manager or clarify-modal feature work.
title: Fix stale dashboard refresh after issue actions and worker updates
